message:
feat(robot): implement real TOON output mode via tru binary (bd-3ma)

- Replace JSON-only stub with real TOON encoding by shelling out to `tru --encode`
- Add env-driven format selection: BV_OUTPUT_FORMAT, TOON_DEFAULT_FORMAT, TOON_STATS
- Support TOON encode options from env: TOON_KEY_FOLDING, TOON_INDENT (clamped 0-16)
- Patch output_format field in payloads to reflect actual format used
- Graceful fallback to JSON when tru binary is unavailable
- Token savings stats on stderr with --stats or TOON_STATS=1
- Add resolve_output_format() and resolve_stats_flag() to CLI
- Add 9 new TOON-specific unit tests (373 total lib tests passing)
- Wire env-driven format/stats resolution in main.rs entry point

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
